creator: selig4win@yahoo.de
text:
No driver for the nForce430 Chipset. Using MB Asus M2NPV-VM. Stop booting while accessing to sata hdd. Also problems with integrated/onboard nic.

Maybe add this to FreeBSD/amd64 Project -- motherboards on
http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html

How-To-Repeat: Booting system.
